class.name: JustAMCPResource
class.brief_description: Base class for resources exposed through the MCP resource API.
class.description: [JustAMCPResource] defines the interface used by [JustAMCPResourceExecutor]. Subclasses describe either a fixed URI or URI template and return MCP-compatible content dictionaries when that URI is read. [codeblock] var resource = JustAMCPResourceProjectFile.new() print(resource.get_uri()) print(resource.is_template()) [/codeblock]

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the human-readable resource name displayed to MCP clients.

method.name: get_schema
method.description: Returns this resource's MCP schema dictionary. Fixed resources use [code]uri[/code]; templated resources use [code]uriTemplate[/code].

method.name: get_uri
method.description: Returns the fixed URI or URI template handled by this resource.

method.name: is_template
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when this resource handles a URI template rather than one fixed URI.

method.name: read_resource
method.description: Reads [param uri] and returns an MCP-compatible contents dictionary or an error dictionary.
